mission.title: helm: Fix null key removal in nested subcharts

resolution.summary:
**What this PR does / why we need it**:

closes #9136 

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

**If applicable**:
- [ ] this PR contains documentation
- [x] this PR contains unit tests
- [ ] this PR has been tested for backwards compatibility - **Need to verify import values are not broken**
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
resources:
  limits:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 128Mi
  requests:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 128Mi

subchart:
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 1000m
      memory: 2Gi
    limits:
      cpu: null
      memory: 2Gi
